name: Michigan Pasties
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boneless beef sirloin (cut into 1/2 inch cubes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef sirloin into 1/2 inch cubes.
2. Coarsely grind the pork butt.
3. NEVER-FAIL PIE CRUST: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar. Add shortening and beat until crumbly (about 2 minutes). In a small bowl, beat eggs well and add vinegar and water. Pour over the dry ingredients and mix until well combined (about one minute).
4. Form dough into six balls, wrap in waxed paper, and refrigerate overnight.
5. FILLING: Preheat oven to 350°F. Combine meats, vegetables, and seasonings in a large bowl. Divide mixture into six wedges, like a pie.
